scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build:main && npm run build:lifebook-viewer
scripts.build:pages: npm run build:star-registry && npm run build:main && npm run build:expert-admin && npm run build:divination && npm run build:lifebook-viewer
scripts.build:main: vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && npm run build:tailwind
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build:star-registry && cd worker && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:pages
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:main && npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.cjs
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build:main && npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.cjs --ui
scripts.sync:palace-static: mkdir -p public/palace-templates && cp palace-templates/palace-theme-presets.json palace-templates/palace-section-shell.css palace-templates/palace-section-themes.css palace-templates/palace-theme-apply.js public/palace-templates/
scripts.verify:sihua-edge: cd worker && npx vitest run tests/s17EdgeAuthority.test.ts tests/s18EdgeAuthority.test.ts tests/s19EdgeAuthority.test.ts tests/palaceFlowsAuthority.test.ts tests/flowTransformAuthority.test.ts
scripts.verify:lifebook: npm run sync:section-order && cd worker && npx vitest run tests/sectionOrderSource.test.ts tests/sectionKeyValidation.test.ts tests/lifeModelStructureFlow.test.ts tests/s22s23NarrativeSnapshot.test.ts tests/starStateNarrativeSlice.test.ts
scripts.verify:palace-preview: cd worker && npx vitest run tests/gateFixturesPalacePreview.test.ts
